message:
refactor(test): centralize fixtures under test/fixtures/ directory

Consolidate test fixtures from scattered crate-level directories into
a unified test/fixtures/ hierarchy:

- pt-config: fixtures_dir() → test/fixtures/config/
- pt-core: FIXTURES_DIR constant → ../../test/fixtures/pt-core
- decision_nomock.rs: fixtures_dir() → test/fixtures/pt-core/
- galaxy_brain_consistency.rs: fixtures_dir() → test/fixtures/pt-core/
- config_matrix_e2e.bats: FIXTURES_DIR → test/fixtures/config

This enables shared fixtures across crates and simplifies the project
layout by having a single source of truth for test data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,7 +26,11 @@ use tempfile::tempdir;
 
 fn fixtures_dir() -> &'static Path {
     Path::new(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"))
-        .join("tests/fixtures")
+        .join("..")
+        .join("..")
+        .join("test")
+        .join("fixtures")
+        .join("pt-core")
         .leak()
 }

@@ -29,7 +29,11 @@ use std::path::Path;
 
 fn fixtures_dir() -> &'static Path {
     Path::new(env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR"))
-        .join("tests/fixtures")
+        .join("..")
+        .join("..")
+        .join("test")
+        .join("fixtures")
+        .join("pt-core")
         .leak()
 }

@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@ setup() {
         export TEST_LOG_FILE_SECONDARY="$ARTIFACT_LOG_DIR/config_matrix.jsonl"
     fi
 
-    FIXTURES_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/crates/pt-config/tests/fixtures"
+    FIXTURES_DIR="$PROJECT_ROOT/test/fixtures/config"
 
     test_start "config matrix" "resolution precedence + validation"
     test_info "Artifacts: $ARTIFACT_DIR"
